description: Comprehensive GO annotation decision summary figure with provenance chain, verdict, and curation recommendations for CG4860 GO:0016937
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 1, figsize=(16, 10))
ax.axis('off')
ax.set_xlim(0, 16)
ax.set_ylim(0, 14)

# Title
ax.text(8, 13.5, 'CG4860 (Q9VGC2) GO:0016937 Annotation Provenance & Decision Summary',
        fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', ha='center', va='center')

# === Section 1: Annotation Provenance Chain ===
ax.text(0.5, 12.5, 'A. Annotation Provenance Chain', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

provenance = [
    ('GO:0016937\n(IBA:GO_Central)', 'PAINT phylogenetic\ninference', 
     'PANTHER PTN000097838\n→ P16219 (HsACADS)\n→ Q3ZBF6 (BovACADS)', '#FFD700'),
    ('GO:0016937\n(IEA:UniProt)', 'EC number mapping\n(GO_REF:0000003)', 
     'EC:1.3.8.1 assigned by\nARBA (ECO:0000256)\n= automatic rule', '#FFD700'),
    ('GO:0003995\n(ISS:FlyBase)', 'Sequence similarity\n(PMID:22758915)', 
     'with/from: Q709F0\n(HsACAD11, 780aa)\n= LONG-chain ACAD!', '#FFA07A'),
    ('GO:0003995\n(IEA:UniProt)', 'InterPro/ARBA\nautomatic', 
     'IPR006089 + ARBA\nAcyl-CoA DH family', '#90EE90'),
    ('EC:1.3.8.1', 'ARBA automatic\nrule', 
     'Based on protein\nname/family match\nNot experimental', '#FFD700'),
]

for i, (annotation, method, source, color) in enumerate(provenance):
    y = 11.5 - i * 1.2
    # Boxes
    rect1 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.5, y-0.4), 2.5, 0.8, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                                      facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1)
    ax.add_patch(rect1)
    ax.text(1.75, y, annotation, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
    
    ax.annotate('', xy=(3.5, y), xytext=(3.0, y),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=1.5))
    
    rect2 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((3.5, y-0.4), 2.8, 0.8, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                                      facecolor='white', edgecolor='gray', linewidth=1)
    ax.add_patch(rect2)
    ax.text(4.9, y, method, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7)
    
    ax.annotate('', xy=(7.0, y), xytext=(6.3, y),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=1.5))
    
    rect3 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((7.0, y-0.4), 3.0, 0.8, boxstyle="round,pad=0.1",
                                      facecolor='#F0F0F0', edgecolor='gray', linewidth=1)
    ax.add_patch(rect3)
    ax.text(8.5, y, source, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=6.5)

# === Section 2: Key Verdict ===
ax.text(11, 12.5, 'B. Verdict', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

verdict_box = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((11, 10.5), 4.5, 2, boxstyle="round,pad=0.2",
                                       facecolor='#FFF3CD', edgecolor='#856404', linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(verdict_box)
ax.text(13.25, 11.8, 'PARTIALLY SUPPORTED', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', 
        ha='center', va='center', color='#856404')
ax.text(13.25, 11.2, '/ OVER-ANNOTATED', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', 
        ha='center', va='center', color='#856404')
ax.text(13.25, 10.7, 'No experimental evidence\nfor SCAD specificity', fontsize=8, 
        ha='center', va='center', color='#856404', style='italic')

# Key evidence summary
ax.text(11, 10.0, 'C. Key Evidence', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
evidence_items = [
    ('Supporting:', '#2E7D32', [
        '57.1% identity to HsACADS',
        'Catalytic Glu (EIYEGTSEIQ) 100% conserved',
        'All 3 ACAD Pfam domains present',
    ]),
    ('Challenging:', '#C62828', [
        'CG4860 LOF ≠ SCAD phenotype (PMID:40519079)',
        'Arc42 = true functional SCAD (71.1% to HsACADS)',
        'Leu→Thr at substrate specificity position',
        'All annotations computational (IBA/IEA/ARBA)',
        'FlyBase ISS ref = ACAD11, not ACADS',
    ]),
]

y_start = 9.5
for category, color, items in evidence_items:
    ax.text(11.2, y_start, category, fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color=color)
    for j, item in enumerate(items):
        ax.text(11.5, y_start - 0.4 - j*0.35, f'• {item}', fontsize=7.5, color=color)
    y_start -= 0.4 + len(items)*0.35 + 0.3

# === Section 3: Recommendation ===
ax.text(0.5, 4.7, 'D. Curation Recommendation', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

rec_box = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.5, 2.0), 15, 2.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.2",
                                    facecolor='#E8F5E9', edgecolor='#2E7D32', linewidth=2)
ax.add_patch(rec_box)

recs = [
    'GO:0016937 (SCAD activity):  Flag as over-specific; do not elevate above IBA. Consider generalizing to GO:0003995.',
    'GO:0003995 (acyl-CoA DH):     RETAIN — well supported by sequence, domains, catalytic residues.',
    'GO:0046359 (butyrate catabolism): FLAG for removal — not supported if CG4860 ≠ functional SCAD.',
    'Arc42 (Q9VDT1):                    Candidate for upgraded GO:0016937 annotation (IMP via PMID:40519079).',
    'Key reference:                     PMID:40519079 — "only Arc42 loss of function mirrors the acylcarnitine profile of ACADS loss of function"',
]

for i, rec in enumerate(recs):
    ax.text(1, 4.2 - i*0.45, rec, fontsize=7.5, fontfamily='monospace')

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#90EE90', edgecolor='black', label='Well-supported'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFD700', edgecolor='black', label='Computationally derived (caution)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFA07A', edgecolor='black', label='Discrepant reference'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower right', fontsize=8, framealpha=0.9)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('go_decision_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("GO decision summary figure saved")
